# Work Log

## Work packages

* IPCC Assement Report Six to Wikibase (AR62W)
* Reporting / community (REP)
* Publishing (PUB)

## Nov

* 24-28 Nov: Supporting data selection (in scope / out of scope) and prioritiesation https://github.com/TIBHannover/climate-knowledge-graph/issues/52 (AR62W)
* 24-26 Nov: AR6 scrape data handover and protocol: Issue https://github.com/TIBHannover/climate-knowledge-graph/issues/58 Repo: https://github.com/TIBHannover/climate-knowledge-graph/issues/58 (AR62W)
* 24 Nov: CSS ToC and Vivlio support (PUB)
* 24 Nov: Project reports for review (REP)
